text: Preserve exact source provenance and every financial field required by the canonical LEDGER transaction contract.
target: Every accepted candidate identifies its explicitly selected owned account, original description, exact signed amount, currency, transaction date, optional distinct posting date, source reference, source adapter version, source fingerprint, and source row identity without silent substitution, inline editing, or precision loss. Evidence: analogous — FR-LEDGER-TRANSACTION-RECORDING and the accepted canonical transaction contract.
